name: 10k-synchronized-burst
description: 10K agents perform synchronized event bursts every 60 seconds. Tests gateway backpressure, NATS JetStream flow control, and ClickHouse insert queue depth under coordinated spike load.

notes.purpose: Verify backpressure works under coordinated bursts
notes.burst_pattern: Every 60s, all 10K agents send 10x their normal batch size simultaneously
notes.critical_check: Event loss must stay < 0.01% even during burst; agents must not disconnect
notes.backpressure_mechanism: Gateway uses NATS publish with flow control; agents receive backpressure via gRPC send buffer blocking
